posts.title: How ‘semantic chaining’ jailbreaks image generation models
posts.summary: Semantic Chaining exploits the fragmented safety architecture of multimodal models, bypassing filters by hiding prohibited intent within a sequence of benign edits. The post How ‘semantic chaining’ jailbreaks image generation models first appeared on TechTalks .
posts.author: Ben Dickson
